name: de Rosenroll 2026 DSGC
short_description: Port of the de Rosenroll et al. 2026 direction-selective retinal ganglion cell (DSGC) model into this project: NEURON HOC morphology template, compiled MOD mechanisms, and Python driver that reproduces the correlated-vs-AMB tuning-curve contrast.

entry_points.name: generate_ar2_batch
entry_points.description: Vectorised AR(2) release-rate noise generator with configurable cross-channel correlation rho (0.6 reproduces the paper's correlated condition; 0.0 the AMB/decorrelated control).

entry_points.name: build_dsgc_cell
entry_points.description: Bootstraps NEURON 8.2.7, loads the vendored nrnmech.dll, sources RGCmodelGD.hoc and returns a configured DSGC cell with its primary/non-terminal/terminal dendrites enumerated and plan-pinned channel densities applied.

entry_points.name: run_tuning_curve
entry_points.description: CLI driver for the four-condition moving-bar sweep (8-direction and 12-angle x {correlated, uncorrelated}); writes a trial-level CSV per condition under data/.

entry_points.name: score_envelope
entry_points.description: Scores the 12-angle correlated tuning curve against the t0004 target envelope using the t0012 tuning_curve_loss library, evaluates the REQ-5 port-fidelity gate, and writes data/score_report.json + results/metrics.json.

entry_points.name: plot_tuning_curves
entry_points.description: Renders polar and Cartesian PNG plots from the four sweep CSVs into results/images/ (plan step 14).
